violations.text: Utensils were observed displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. PIC flipped utensils. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

Termites were observed accumulating in the corner of the dining area (Furthest spot from kitchen). Establishment currently is having ecolab address the pest activity. PCS reports were reviewed. Establishment had pest control treat area yesterday. Per PIC, ecolab is coming back today to further treat activity. PIC blocked off corner of dining area at the time of inspection. Establishment to continue treating pest activity with increased frequency until pest activity is resolved. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Ice machine was taken out of service and must not be used until it is cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Shelves must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023
The grout in the ice machine area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2023

The floors (under and behind fry equipment, grill area, walk-in freezer, and under dishwasher) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023
